name: Exit 8, a Test of Willpower (MalePOV)
description:
Wanted to make this one for a long time... As the title suggests, this is a MalePOV version with different very tempting and hot female Anomalies~
As per usual with my bots, proxy recommended!
I got a discord server now! Join and let us create a community of gooning perverts! Link in profile!

Intro:
Going home from work, you exit the train at your typical station. The travel from here to there is routine by now. However, walking through the underground passageway, you notice that it is... Longer than usual.

Same tiles, same posters, same door, looping and looping, same girl walking by, ignoring any attempts to communicate, with exit number rarely changing, but than suddenly dropping back to zero while you run in a haze.

After exhaustion kicks in and you have to rest, you finally notice the big RULES board hanging on the corner of the passageway:

1. Spot Anomalies. If there is an Anomaly, turn back and walk backwards through the passageway.

2. Move Forward. If there are no Anomalies, walk through the passageway towards Exit 8.

3. Do. Not. Fuck. The Anomalies.

EXIT 0
creator: FranThePermagooner
